nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the PermissionModePicker component for the chat composer controls.

nodes.name: PlusMenu.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat composer plus-menu button that opens the file attachment dialog via the prompt input attachments controller.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the PlusMenu component.

nodes.name: SlashCommandInput.tsx
nodes.summary: Prompt input wrapper that intercepts keyboard events to drive slash-command navigation and execution against the slash command menu.

nodes.name: SlashCommandMenu.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the selectable list of matching slash commands with keyboard-driven selection and scroll-into-view for the highlighted item.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the SlashCommandMenu component.

nodes.name: FileMentionNode.tsx
nodes.summary: Tiptap custom node defining the inline @file mention chip, its HTML parse/render behavior, and React node view.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines a Tiptap Node extension with addAttributes/renderHTML and a ReactNodeViewRenderer.

nodes.name: SlashCommandNode.tsx
nodes.summary: Tiptap custom node rendering an interactive slash-command chip with inline argument editing, option filtering, keyboard handling, and node view integration.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines a large React node-view component with a Tiptap Node extension (addAttributes/renderHTML/addNodeView).

nodes.name: SlashCommandPreviewPopover.tsx
nodes.summary: Anchored popover that debounces slash-command input, resolves a live command preview, and positions itself over the active slash-command chip in the editor.

nodes.name: TiptapPromptEditor.tsx
nodes.summary: Rich prompt editor built on Tiptap wiring up file @mention and /slash-command suggestion plugins, keyboard shortcuts, paste-to-attach, and serialization to plain text.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of Tiptap Extension.create and Suggestion ProseMirror plugins with imperative editor chains.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the TiptapPromptEditor component and its props type.

nodes.name: parseTextToEditorContent.ts
nodes.summary: Converts plain prompt text into Tiptap document content, splitting on newlines and expanding @mention tokens into file-mention nodes.

nodes.name: serializeEditorToText.ts
nodes.summary: Serializes the Tiptap editor document back to plain text, converting file-mention and slash-command nodes to their token representations.

nodes.name: useFocusPromptOnPane.ts
nodes.summary: Hook that focuses the prompt input controller when the owning pane becomes focused.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the useSlashCommandExecutor hook.

nodes.name: model-query.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the model query normalization and lookup helpers used by the slash-command executor.

nodes.name: model-query.ts
nodes.summary: Helpers to normalize a /model slash-command argument and locate a matching model by id or name from the available models list.

nodes.name: prompt-result.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for resolving the prompt result produced when a slash command expands into prompt text.

nodes.name: prompt-result.ts
nodes.summary: Derives the display label and prompt text for a resolved slash command, distinguishing prompt-producing commands from action commands.

nodes.name: useSlashCommandExecutor.ts
nodes.summary: Hook that resolves a submitted slash command via tRPC and dispatches its side effects: starting fresh sessions, stopping responses, switching models, showing MCP overview, or producing prompt text.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the useSlashCommands hook plus slash-command matching, ranking, and action-resolution helpers and types.

nodes.name: styles.ts
nodes.summary: Shared style constant defining the pill button class used across chat composer controls.

nodes.name: types.ts
nodes.summary: Shared TypeScript type definitions for the chat interface, including slash commands, models, and composer props.

nodes.name: ChatPaneInterface.tsx
nodes.summary: Top-level workspace chat pane orchestrating message sending, session lifecycle, slash-command execution, optimistic uploads, model selection, auto-launch, and approval/plan/question responses via tRPC.

nodes.name: ChatInputFooter.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat composer footer wiring the Tiptap prompt editor, file search, linked issues, slash-command preview, and composer controls into a single submit surface.

nodes.name: ChatComposerControls.tsx
nodes.summary: Composer control row rendering the model picker, permission mode picker, plus menu, and submit/stop controls beneath the prompt editor.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the ChatComposerControls component.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the ChatInputDropZone component.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the ChatShortcuts component.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the FileDropOverlay component.

nodes.name: PlusMenu
nodes.summary: Renders the plus-menu button that opens the file attachment dialog through the prompt input attachments controller.

nodes.name: SlashCommandInput
nodes.summary: Prompt input component that handles Enter, Escape, and arrow keys to execute or navigate slash commands.

nodes.name: SlashCommandMenu
nodes.summary: Renders the slash-command list with hover/select handlers and scrolls the selected item into view.

nodes.name: FileMentionChip
nodes.summary: React node-view rendering an inline file-mention chip showing the file's basename.

nodes.name: SlashCommandChip
nodes.summary: Interactive slash-command chip node view supporting inline argument editing, filtered option selection, and rich keyboard navigation within the editor.

nodes.name: SlashCommandPreviewPopover
nodes.summary: Popover that debounces slash input, fetches a command preview, and anchors itself to the active slash-command chip in the editor.

nodes.name: TiptapPromptEditor
nodes.summary: Rich prompt editor component configuring Tiptap with mention and slash-command suggestion plugins, keyboard shortcuts, paste-to-attach, and text serialization.

nodes.name: parseTextToEditorContent
nodes.summary: Parses plain prompt text into Tiptap document nodes, expanding @mention tokens into file-mention nodes.

nodes.name: serializeEditorToText
nodes.summary: Serializes the Tiptap document to plain text, converting mention and slash-command nodes to their token forms.

nodes.name: useFocusPromptOnPane
nodes.summary: Hook that focuses the prompt input controller whenever the pane's focused flag becomes true.

nodes.name: normalizeModelQueryFromActionArgument
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw /model action argument by trimming and extracting the first tokenized model query.

nodes.name: findModelByQuery
nodes.summary: Finds a model matching a query by exact id, exact name, then partial id/name substring matching.

nodes.name: resolveSlashPromptResult
nodes.summary: Resolves the prompt text and display label produced when a slash command expands into a prompt.

nodes.name: useSlashCommandExecutor
nodes.summary: Hook resolving a submitted slash command over tRPC and dispatching its action: fresh session, stop, model switch, MCP overview, or prompt expansion, with toast feedback and analytics.

nodes.name: ChatUploadFooter
nodes.summary: Footer wrapper that binds optimistic upload state to the composer footer and maps uploaded files onto outgoing messages.

nodes.name: useAvailableModels
nodes.summary: Hook fetching the list of available chat models, honoring desktop dev-mode overrides.

nodes.name: cloneMessageContent
nodes.summary: Deep-clones message content using structuredClone with a JSON fallback for editing/restart flows.

nodes.name: ChatPaneInterface
nodes.summary: Main workspace chat pane component managing session state, message sending, slash-command execution, auto-launch, and approval/plan/question response flows.

nodes.name: ChatInputFooter
nodes.summary: Composer footer component wiring the prompt editor, file search, linked issues, and submit handling into the chat input surface.

nodes.name: ChatComposerControls
nodes.summary: Renders the composer control row: model picker, permission mode picker, plus menu, and submit/stop button.
